interest_levels.name: Neutral
interest_levels.description: Early conversation, no clear signal either way yet.
interest_levels.tone_guidance: Keep things light and low-pressure. No assumptions about mutual interest yet.

interest_levels.name: Warm
interest_levels.tone_guidance: You can be a bit more personal and forward, while still reading their responses.

interest_levels.name: Interested
interest_levels.description: Clear mutual interest has been established.
interest_levels.tone_guidance: Direct, confident follow-through - e.g. suggesting a specific plan - fits here.
